next_steps: Obtain peripheral blood smear for morulae and LDH level
Order full tick-borne panel (Anaplasma, Ehrlichia, Babesia, Borrelia)
Perform HLH workup (ferritin, triglycerides, soluble IL-2 receptor/CD25, fibrinogen)
Repeat imaging with contrast-enhanced CT of the abdomen/pelvis or MRI/MRCP to re-evaluate biliary tree and hepatic parenchyma
Obtain formal transthoracic echocardiogram to rule out endocarditis
Monitor renal function closely; evaluate for acute tubular necrosis versus prerenal etiology
